case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS ALARCON, JOSE LUIS JR.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $545.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT ALARCON, JOSE LUIS JR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-24-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALARCON, JOSE LUIS JR. $545.00 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $571.00, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS FOR AN AMBULANCE BILL. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
